channel.title: Homeassistant on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Homeassistant on Margrop Blog

item.title: AppDaemon (HADashboard) Installation Guide
item.description:
Installation Prerequisites

  • HomeAssistant access address and permanent Token
  • Linux runtime environment
  • Python3 runtime environment (the following is based on CentOS 7)
yum install python3
pip install -U pip3 setuptools

item.title: Fix HAVCS Failing to Start on the Latest Home Assistant: AttributeError: 'ApiConfig' object has no attribute 'base_url'
item.description:
Do Not Upgrade HA Too Frequently [Updated May 15, 2021]

I strongly do not recommend upgrading to core-2021.3.1 and later, including core-2021.5.3 From core-2021.3.1 onward there are some strange bugs. The version that is currently stable for the author is still core-2021.2.3

Problem Description

After the author upgraded Home Assistant to the latest version, HAVCS could no longer start normally.

Home Assistant version that can run HAVCS normally: core-2021.2.3 Home Assistant version that cannot run HAVCS: core-2021.5.3

Checking the Home Assistant logs showed this error:

AttributeError: 'ApiConfig' object has no attribute 'base_url'

item.title: Home Assistant: Add a Custom IR Remote and Support Tmall Genie and Xiaodu
item.description:
Preparation

  • An online Mi Home universal remote already added to Home Assistant
  • The IP address and token of the Mi Home universal remote

How do you get the IP address? Open the Mi Home app on your phone, select the device bound to your Xiaomi account, enter it, then tap the ... in the top right -> More settings -> Network information to view the device IP address.

How do you get the token? Reference 1: Use an open-source tool to export Xiaomi Token Reference 2: Retrieving the Access Token

item.title: Integrating HomeAssistant with Tmall Genie, 2021 Version
item.description: Avoid Frequent HA Upgrades [Updated May 15, 2021] 强烈不建议升级到 core-2021.3.1 以及之后的版本，包括 core-2021.5.3 从 core-2021.3.1 以后的版本有一些莫名的 bug，目前博主稳定使用的版本还是 core-2021.2.3 Tmall Genie Platform: https://iot.aligenie.com/skill/home Alibaba Life IoT Platform: https://living.aliyun.com/

item.title: HomeAssistant: Common HACS, Github Third-party Support Library Repos
How to Install HACS in Home Assistant
item.description:
If Using a Virtual Machine Environment (Home Assistant OS)

  1. Go to the Supervisor panel
  2. Install an SSH add-on (enable advanced mode in your user profile first)
  3. Configure the selected SSH add-on
  4. Start the SSH add-on
  5. Connect to the SSH add-on
  6. Run the HACS installation script
wget -q -O - https://hacs.xyz/install | bash -
